in_scope: Extend IPlatformInfo with bool IsWindows { get; } in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Infrastructure/IPlatformInfo.cs. Implement in SystemPlatformInfo via RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows).
Add @using AiEng.Platform.Application.Infrastructure to src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/_Imports.razor.

Modify src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/AppProjectCard.razor: add @inject IProcessRunner + @inject IPlatformInfo + @inject ILogger<AppProjectCard>; replace the M3.2 Disabled=true on the Open AppButton with the computed Disabled=@(!IsWindowsHost); wire @onclick=OnOpenClick; add the OnOpenClick → OpenAsync private method; add the OpenError transient state; render the OpenError inline as <div class=app-project-card-open-error role=alert> when non-null; add the OpenButtonTitle computed property for the tooltip.

Modify src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/AppProjectCard.razor.css: add the .app-project-card-open-error scoped CSS class (uses --app-error and --app-surface-2; no new design-system component).

Modify tests/AiEng.Platform.ComponentTests/Projects/AppProjectCardTests.cs: delete Open_Button_Remains_Disabled_In_M3_2; add the 5 new bUnit tests (Open_Button_Is_Enabled_When_Host_Is_Windows, Open_Button_Is_Disabled_When_Host_Is_Not_Windows, Clicking_Open_Invokes_IProcessRunner_With_Explorer_And_ProjectPath, Open_Click_Passes_ProjectPath_Single_Element_As_Argument, Open_Click_Swallows_Process_Exceptions); add FakeProcessRunner and FakePlatformInfo test doubles; add a constructor that registers a default IPlatformInfo (Windows) + IProcessRunner (FakeProcessRunner) so the pre-existing tests pass without per-test service registration.

Modify tests/AiEng.Platform.ArchitectureTests/Pages/PagesResolveProjectsThroughServiceTests.cs: add AppProjectCard_resolves_open_through_IProcessRunner architecture test asserting AppProjectCard.razor contains @inject IProcessRunner and no Process.Start / ProcessStartInfo token.

Rewrite docs/infrastructure.md § 7 from future tense to delivered tense; update § 6 Platform Info to document the new IsWindows property; update § 9 Tests cumulative count to 323 passed; update § 10 Out of Scope to reflect M4-A.2 delivered (remove the M4-A.2 deferred item).

Design-system AppDialog primitive. The M4-A.2 Open action does not use a confirmation dialog; the action is a single explorer.exe <path> invocation; the blast radius is minimal; no new design-system component is added in M4-A.2.
macOS / Linux credential vault. The WindowsCredentialVault is Windows-only; on non-Windows hosts it throws PlatformNotSupportedException. Cross-platform credential storage is a future capability.

last_action.outcome: M4-A.2 (T-022) is delivered 2026-07-11. The Open action on AppProjectCard is enabled. The IPlatformInfo interface is extended with bool IsWindows { get; } (implemented in SystemPlatformInfo via RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows)). AppProjectCard.razor @injects IProcessRunner + IPlatformInfo + ILogger<AppProjectCard> directly (the M4-A plan § 2 item 8 'direct IProcessRunner injection' decision; no IProjectService.OpenAsync facade and no IOpenProjectAction seam); the click handler calls IProcessRunner.RunToCompletionAsync('explorer.exe', new[] { Project.Path }, default); the button is gated on IPlatformInfo.IsWindows (computed Disabled=@(!IsWindowsHost)); exceptions (Win32Exception + InvalidOperationException + IOException) are swallowed and surfaced as a transient inline OpenError. 5 new bUnit tests ship (Open_Button_Is_Enabled_When_Host_Is_Windows, Open_Button_Is_Disabled_When_Host_Is_Not_Windows, Clicking_Open_Invokes_IProcessRunner_With_Explorer_And_ProjectPath, Open_Click_Passes_ProjectPath_Single_Element_As_Argument, Open_Click_Swallows_Process_Exceptions) + 1 new active architecture test (AppProjectCard_resolves_open_through_IProcessRunner). The M3.2 Open_Button_Remains_Disabled_In_M3_2 test is deleted. docs/infrastructure.md § 7 is rewritten from future tense to delivered tense; docs/projects.md § 1/§ 4/§ 5.1/§ 7.2/§ 7.3 are updated; ROADMAP.md and .ai/plans/master-delivery-plan.md are updated; .ai/state/capabilities.json C-012 is updated to Delivered. Validation: 323 passed, 0 failed, 9 skipped (per ADR-016 / M4-D); 0 warnings, 0 errors; format clean; visual smoke on /projects green (200; Open action enabled on Windows hosts). M4-A.2 closeout commit feat(m4-a.2): enable AppProjectCard.Open action via IProcessRunner is on main. The M4-A.2 feature branch is fast-forwarded into main and deleted. No push (not authorised in this session). The session does NOT begin M4-A.3, M4-B, M4-C, or M4-D (per the brief). Four documented deviations: (1) IProcessRunner.RunToCompletionAsync takes IReadOnlyList<string> arguments (the M4-A plan § 2 item 8 prose example used a single string with manual quote escaping; the actual contract uses ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList for proper quoting); (2) IPlatformInfo.IsWindows is added in M4-A.2 (the M4-A plan § 8 risk row 6 anticipated this addition); (3) ILogger<AppProjectCard> is introduced in M4-A.2 (the App layer had not previously used ILogger<T>; the BCL provides it via the Blazor Server host DI container; no registration is needed); (4) OpenError inline rendering uses a single scoped CSS class .app-project-card-open-error (no new design-system AppInlineError primitive; the M3.2 minimum-blast-radius decision is preserved).
